description: Product whose name, molecular identity, composition, concentration or marketed-product relationship is unresolved or materially conflicting.
mandatory_evidence: Direct manufacturer declaration of complete identity or composition
Unambiguous proper name and product definition
Resolution of every known identity conflict or name collision
Batch-specific certificate of analysis and raw-data package
minimum_methods: At least two orthogonal identity methods
automatic_rejection: Vendor assertion without primary or analytical support
Silent correction of a possible typo or trade name
Progression to efficacy, safety or commercial review before identity closure
